title: Snow Pig [Forge]
description: Ever wanted a pig in snowy biomes? No? Well here you go anyway!
body:
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/V7V5SJI0W)

📖About:

This mod adds a frozen pig to minecraft. This pig is pretty similar to a normal pig and drops frozen porkchop that can be thawed into regular porkchop.

Fire aspect also thawes the frozen porkchop.

You can find the pig in all biomes that are in the "ICY"-Category

When the Snow Pig is killed by a Stray, it will drop a custom music disc with a Song made by Luz#8017

You can also listen to this song here:
YouTube 

Soundcloud

 

 

Attention: The 1.12.2 & 1.15.2 version of this mod are not supported anymore! If anyone wants to backport this mod, please contact me on Discord: Uraneptus#5442 or Twitter

 You can find the fabric version here!

 

👾Bugs:

It would help me a lot if you report bugs to me via the issues page

 

🎲 Optional Mod Compatibility:

- Farmer's Delight

- Catalogue

🚀Planned:

- Port to future versions 

 

[If you have any feature suggestions, let me know in the comments or on the issues page!]

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/V7V5SJI0W)
